questions.question: The term 'Sangam' refers to which of the following?
questions.option_2: A literary assembly of Tamil scholars

questions.question: As of March 14, 2024, which of the following is the world’s tallest statue?
Which of the following is considered the first full-length Indian feature film, released in 1913?
Which stone was mainly utilised in building the Chennakeshava Temple in Belur, India?
Which of the following regional film industries is based in Chennai and produces movies in the Tamil language?
What is a notable characteristic of the carvings found at the entrances of the Sanchi Stupa?
questions.option_4: Mythical creatures like yakshas and kinnaras

questions.question: __________ serves as the conventional base material for the art form known as Kalamkari.
Kathputli is a traditional puppet show of which of the following Indian states?
Crafted using the lost-wax technique in Mohenjo-daro, a significant city of the Indus Valley Civilisation, the prehistoric Dancing Girl figurine is primarily made of which of the following materials?
Who is the director of the film 'Laapataa Ladies', which won Best Picture at the 2025 IIFA Awards?
Which of the following colonial-era buildings in Chennai serves as the headquarters of the Greater Chennai Corporation?
Which of the following is a traditional folk painting style from Bihar?
In the realm of cinema, documentaries are characterised by:
questions.option_3: presenting real-world content for learning or leisure
questions.option_4: aiming to communicate about mythological characters

questions.question: The Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminus is a prime example of which of the following types of architectural style?
The popular folk art of Phad painting is traditionally associated with which of the following Indian states?
Which of the following texts is considered the earliest Tamil grammar work?
Which of the following architectural styles is predominantly associated with the Gateway of India in Mumbai?
Sanskrit language is mainly used for creating:
Which of the following languages is most notably associated with the literary contributions of Girish Karnad, exemplified by his acclaimed play 'Tughlaq'?
Which architectural style characterises the Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Terminus (CSMT) building in Mumbai, India, completed in 1887?
What is a distinctive feature of Warli paintings?
What is a key feature of classical Indian drama?
What is the total number of cave structures at the Ajanta Caves location in Maharashtra, India, including the one that was never completed?
Which of the following is a well-known bronze artefact from the Indus Valley Civilisation, dating to around 2500 BCE?
questions.option_1: Stone seal of unicorn from Lothal

questions.question: Manimekali, a notable work within early Tamil literature, is categorised as which type of literary composition?
